results.title: Minder confirmed decisions v2
results.content: Minder plan v2 confirmed: Team multi-user (email+username from git), Auth mandatory (API key + JWT + RBAC), SSE transport from Phase 1, NV-Embed-v2 GGUF + Nemotron-3 GGUF mandatory (offline-first, OpenAI fallback optional), Docker sandbox mandatory for verification (subprocess dev mode), Skills seeded from external GitHub repo, CI/CD from Phase 1 (GitHub Actions + GitHub Releases + GitHub Packages/ghcr.io), Knowledge Graph Phase 3 confirmed. 9 stores total (added User Store). Plan at docs/PLAN.md v2.0 status: DECISIONS CONFIRMED.

results.title: Minder plan translated and expanded
results.content: Translated docs/PLAN.md fully to English and expanded the architecture to include workflow governance, dashboard-configured process enforcement, repository-local state under .minder/, workflow planner node, workflow tools, repository context stores, and MCP-guided next-step orchestration for TDD-style delivery. Document version updated to 3.0 and marked ready for implementation review.

results.title: Phase 1 setup-first planning refinement
results.content: For rental-management-ui, the user clarified that the first implementation focus should be tech stack setup, project scaffold, and project styling before deeper API work. Instead of inserting a pre-Phase-1 decimal phase, the safe planning move was to reframe Phase 1 itself and create 01-CONTEXT plus 01-01/01-02/01-03 plans covering project scaffold/providers, design tokens and shell, then auth pages and protected routing. STATE and .continue-here were updated so the next execution step is 01-01-PLAN.md while Phase 01.1 remains queued for typed API integration.

results.title: Phase 04 billing plans created
results.content: Created .planning/phases/04-billing-engine-core-value with 04-RESEARCH.md, 04-VALIDATION.md, and three execution plans. Plan split is sequential: 04-01 builds billing period helpers plus metered/per-person/prorate calculation services and tests; 04-02 adds Invoice and InvoiceItem persistence, generation/regeneration API, migration, and app wiring; 04-03 adds Puppeteer-based PDF export from invoice snapshots. STATE.md now marks Phase 04 as planned and points resume continuity at 04-01-PLAN.md.

results.title: Resume point after Phase 03
results.content: On 2026-03-26 resume check, .planning/STATE.md showed Phases 00-03 complete with clean git status, no HANDOFF.json, no .continue-here files, no interrupted agents, and no incomplete plans. Next logical work is Phase 04 Billing Engine; Phase 04 has no CONTEXT.md yet, so discuss-phase is the recommended first step before planning because billing/prorate edge cases are the core complexity.
